name: SaaS Autopilot - Lead Capture and Outreach Draft Blueprint
description: A Make.com-style blueprint for capturing a lead, enriching context, drafting a personalized outreach message, storing the result, and alerting the team.
disclaimer: This is a viewer blueprint template. Replace placeholder module IDs, connection IDs, API keys, webhook URLs, and sheet IDs before use.

inputs.prompt: Write a concise B2B outreach email for {{2.contact_name}} at {{2.company_name}}. Reference their role {{2.role}} and propose an automation that reduces manual follow-up. Do not invent facts. Keep it under 130 words.

body.text: New outreach draft ready for {{2.company_name}}. Review it in the outreach sheet before sending.

qa_checks: No private API key is stored in module output.
Draft does not invent company facts.
Sheet row is created with status needs_review.
Alert is sent to the correct channel.
Human review happens before any outbound email is sent.
